operational_knowledge_units.title: Hospital tags model drives subscribed tag processing by TagTypeParent
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that data from the hospital controller is processed using a list of tags that the system subscribes to, and actions are taken based on TagTypeParent.
observed_evidence: Slide title: 'Sorter Sweeper Database / Hospital Tags Model'
Visible text: 'To process the data from the hospital controller we have a list of tags that we subscribe to and action on based on the TagTypeParent.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Sorter Sweeper Database Hospital Tags Model. Data from the hospital controller is handled through a subscribed list of tags, and the system actions those tags based on TagTypeParent.
